_note: The MCP server self-locates its bundled luamemo modules from its own script path (see the bootstrap at the top of mcp/server.lua), so no LUA_PATH is needed and a stale system LuaRocks install cannot shadow them. pgmoon/luasocket/cjson still resolve via the default (system LuaRocks) package path. ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} points at the installed plugin directory. For a bare dev clone opened as a project WITHOUT installing the plugin (so ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} is unset), register the server with an absolute path instead: claude mcp add luamemo -s local --env MEMO_DB_URL=... -- lua5.1 <repo>/mcp/server.lua
